subject: docs: fix documentation inaccuracies found in codebase review
body:
- USER_GUIDE.md: remove false claim about coordinate editing in admin
  (actual fields: name, brand, address, city, postal code, phone)
- CLAUDE.md: update test count from 21 to 30 (tests were added without
  updating the architecture comment)
- CLAUDE.md: add missing root config files to architecture tree
  (app.json, package.json, tsconfig.json, jest.config.js, vercel.json,
  .env.example)
- SESSION_NOTES.md: update for current session
